name: No witnesses to my noise exposure, can I still win?

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my noise exposure, can I still win?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, with medicals, logs, equipment types proving high noise.[1] Context: Self-docs and records suffice often.[1] Key factors: Decibel estimates, job duties.[1] Practical guidance: Note daily exposure, get tested; attorney uses experts.[7] Circumstantial evidence works.
